case_title: WESTSIDE COMMUNITY MENTAL HEALTH INC. VS. ADRIAN GAINO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WESTSIDE COMMUNITY MENTAL HEALTH INC.'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ADVANCING HEARING ON DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-24-2005 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 218

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, CASE SETTLED THE FOLLOWING TERMS AND CONDITIONS WERE PUT ON THE RECORD: THE PLAINTIFF SHALL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 1914 MCALLISTER AT MIDNIGHT ON 1/31/06 AND JUDGMENT STAYED UNTIL 1/31/06 AND WILL DISMISS MATTER IF DEFENDANT MOVES OUT BY 1/31/06; THE SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $1100 PLUS REGULAR INTEREST TO BE RETURNED TO THE DEFENDANT A WEEK AFTER SHE SIGNS AGREEMENT; SECTION 8 VOUCHERS WILL BE SUBMITTED FOR RENT AND THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT OWE ANY BACK RENT AND FUTURE RENT OVER SECTION 8 VOUCHERS; PLAINTIFF TO DO REPAIRS; IN RESERVE IS THE CLAIM OF DEFENDANT THAT ADDITIONAL SECURITY DEPOSIT IS OWED AND DEFENDANT SHALL PROVIDE DOCUMENTATION BY 9/15/05 AND IF THERE IS A PROBLEM GO TO MEDIATION BY 10/14/05 AND SMALL CLAIMS IF NEEDED.TRIAL DATE OF 8/29/05 IS VACATED.(218 UDGE PRO TEM: IRVING PFEFFER; CLERK: LINDA ESPY; REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON)
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: THORNLEY, TRENT J SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR GAINO, ADRIAN

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED GRANTING WESTSIDE COMMUNITY MENTAL HEALTH INC.S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ADVANCING HEARING ON DEFENDANTS DEMURRER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESTSIDE COMMUNITY MENTAL HEALTH INC.

LAW AND MOTION, 301, DUE TO MR. GAINO'S FAILURE TO GIVE NOTICE TO THE PLAINTIFF OF HIS INTENTION TO ARGUE THE CASE, THE COURT DID NOT ALLOW ANY FURTHER ARGUMENT. THE COURT ADOPTED HIS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT ADRIAN GAINO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. NOTICE AND COMPLAINT ADEQUATELY SPECIFIED RENT DUE NOTWITHSTANDING ARITHMETIC ERROR IN TOTAL. THE DEFENDANT HAS FIVE(5) DAYS TO ANSWER THE COMPLAINT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN CSR#8189

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-24-2005 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Judge Pro Tem: Irving Pfeffer; Clerk: Linda Espy; Reporter: Christina Paxton

Appearances: AttorneyTimothy Flaherty for the Plaintiff and attorney Trent J. Thornley for Defendant Adrian Gaino

This cause came on regularly for unlawful detainer settlement conference. The parties reached a settlement. The following terms and conditions were put on the record: The plaintiff shall recover from defendant the premises located at 1914 McAllister at midnight on 1/31/06 and judgment stayed until 1/31/06 and will dismiss matter if defendant moves out by 1/31/06; the security deposit of $1100 plus regular interest to be returned to the defendant a week after she signs agreement; section 8 vouchers will be submitted for rent and the defendant does not owe any back rent and future rent over section 8 vouchers; plaintiff to do repairs; in reserve is the claim of defendant that additional security deposit is owed and defendant shall provide documentation by 9/15/05 and if there is a problem go to mediation by 10/14/05 and small claims if needed.
Trial date of 8/29/05 is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-27-2005 Advanced From Aug-17-05 To Aug-04-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-04-2005 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
ADRIAN GAINO, IN PROPRIA PERSONA, (415) 447-9867, 1914 MCALLISTER ST., SF, CA 94115, DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY
TIMOTHY M. FLAHERTY, ESQ. OF CARROLL, BURDICK & MCDONOUGH, LLP, (415) 989-5900, FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, WESTSIDE COMMUNITY MENTAL HEALTH, INC.

RULING:
DUE TO MR. GAINO'S FAILURE TO GIVE NOTICE TO THE PLAINTIFF OF HIS INTENTION TO ARGUE THE CASE, THE COURT DID NOT ALLOW ANY FURTHER ARGUMENT. THE COURT ADOPTED HIS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT ADRIAN GAINO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. NOTICE AND COMPLAINT ADEQUATELY SPECIFIED RENT DUE NOTWITHSTANDING ARITHMETIC ERROR IN TOTAL. THE DEFENDANT HAS FIVE(5) DAYS TO ANSWER THE COMPLAINT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/PJB/ES(X-PJB) REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR# 8189
